channel.title: France 24 - International breaking news, top stories and headlines
channel.description: Breaking news and world news from France 24 on Business, Sports, Culture. Video news. News from the US, Europe, Asia Pacific, Africa, Middle East, America

item.title: US secret service kills gunman near White House, President Trump says suspect had ‘violent history’
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Despite Middle East war, foreign pilgrims flock to Mecca for hajj
item.description: Despite the war in the Middle East, foreign pilgrims have flocked to Mecca to participate in this year’s hajj. According to officials, more than 1.5 million have already arrived in Saudi Arabia, surpassing last year’s numbers.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Djokovic headlines opening day at French Open
item.description: Novak Djokovic is headlining the first day of French Open on Sunday, where he will face Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard on the centre court. The 39-year-old has already won the Roland Garros tournament three times, and if he wins it again, he would have a record 25 Grand Slam titles under his belt.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Middle East war live: Pakistan offers to host next Iran-US peace talks 'very soon'
item.description: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said his country hopes to host the next round of Iran-US peace talks, positioning Islamabad at the centre of mediation efforts as President Donald Trump said a largely negotiated agreement could soon reopen the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Russian ballistic missile attack hits Kyiv after Moscow vows retaliation
item.description: A large Russian ballistic missile attack struck Kyiv early on Sunday, wounding at least five people and damaging residential buildings after Moscow threatened retaliation for deadly Ukrainian drone strikes in occupied eastern Ukraine. Ukrainian and US officials had warned hours earlier of a potentially significant assault on the capital.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Gunman killed by Secret Service after shooting near White House
item.description: A gunman opened fire near the White House on Saturday evening before being shot dead by US Secret Service agents in a confrontation that also left a bystander wounded. President Donald Trump, who was inside the White House at the time, was not harmed in the incident.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: 'Fjord' starring Sebastian Stan wins the Palme d’Or at 2026 Cannes Film Festival
item.description: Romanian director Cristian Mungiu has won the Palme d’Or for 'Fjord', a tense family drama starring Sebastian Stan and Renate Reinsve. In FRANCE 24’s special Cannes awards programme, Eve Jackson and critic Emma Jones break down all the major winners from the closing ceremony – from the Grand Prix for 'Minotaur' to the double acting prizes for 'All of a Sudden' and 'Coward'.
item.dc:creator: Eve JACKSON

item.title: Ebola epidemic: Ten African countries at risk
item.description: Africa CDC has issued a fresh warning this Saturday, saying up to ten additional African countries are now at risk as the Ebola outbreak spreads across the region. Those countries are Angola, Burundi, the Central African Republic, the Republic of Congo, Ethiopia, Kenya, Rwanda, South Sudan, Tanzania and Zambia. Uganda has confirmed three new cases, while the Red Cross says three volunteers have died in eastern DR Congo after contracting the virus in March. In Ituri’s Mongbwalu, residents attacked and burned part of an Ebola treatment centre, forcing 18 suspected cases to flee, while another centre in Rwampara was also set on fire.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: 'Fjord' by Romania's Cristian Mungiu wins Palme d'Or at Cannes Film Festival
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Fjord wins Palme d’Or at Cannes Film Festival
item.description:
🎞️The film "Fjord" directed by Cristian Mungiu, starring Renate Reinsve and Sebastian Stan, wins the top prize at the 79th Cannes Film Festival.
Inspired by real cases, the film follows a Romanian family who move to Norway and face accusations of child abuse amid a profound cultural clash.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Film stars take to the Cannes red carpet ahead of Palme d'Or announcement
item.description: FRANCE 24 film critic Emma Jones reports from the red carpet at the 79th Cannes Film Festival in southern France.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: 'Significant movement here in Washington': US and Iran report progress towards deal on ending war
item.description: FRANCE 24 correspondent Fraser Jackson speaks from Washington, DC on the reported progress in the talks on ending the US-Israeli war on Iran.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: AI, Palantir & the Pushback: AI, Palantir & the Pushback: The London Mayor Vs the Met Police
item.description:
As concerns continue to grow over artificial intelligence, national security and digital sovereignty, London Mayor Sadiq Khan has blocked a proposed fifty-million-pound contract between the Metropolitan Police and AI giant Palantir. The company had been expected to provide advanced tools to help police process intelligence in criminal investigations.
To discuss the decision, FRANCE 24’s Gavin Lee is joined by Susan Hall, leader of the Conservative Party in the London Assembly.
item.dc:creator: Guillaume MERCIER

item.title: 'Fjord' by Romania's Cristian Mungiu wins Palme d'Or at Cannes Film Festival
item.description: The Norway-set drama "Fjord" by Romanian director Cristian Mungiu was awarded the Palme d'Or at the closing ceremony of the 79th Cannes Film Festival as critics hailed a strong field of contenders directed by auteurs from Russia, Iran, Japan and beyond.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Israeli minister Ben-Gvir banned from entering France
item.description: Andrew Hiliar has more.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: 🔴 US and Iran are ‘getting a lot closer’ to finalising agreement, Trump says
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Women's Champions League final: Lyon, Barcelona clash for European crown
item.description: Selena Sykes has more.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Ebola epidemic threatens ten African countries in addition to DRC and Uganda
item.description: Ten African countries are at risk of being affected by the Ebola virus, in addition to the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, the African Union's health agency warned on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Senegal's president Faye sacks PM Sonko after months of tension
item.description: Paul Melly, Consulting Fellow, Africa Programme, Chatham House, is our guest.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Uganda health authorities confirms new Ebola cases, linked to DR Congo
item.description: Three new Ebola cases have been confirmed in Uganda, health authorities said Saturday, after the World Health Organization raised the risk from the deadly outbreak to the highest level for neighbouring Democratic Republic of Congo.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Senegal's president fires prime minister after months of tensions
item.description: Caitlin Kelly, our corespondent in Dakar, has more.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Coal mine explosion in China kills 90 people, state media say
item.description: A gas explosion at a coal mine in China’s northern Shanxi province killed at least 90 people, state media said on Saturday, in the country’s deadliest mining accident in recent years.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Ebola: WHO raises health risk to 'very high' in DR Congo and new cases in Uganda
item.description: Gabriela Arenas, Coordinator for Regional Operations in Africa IFRC in Kenya, is our guest.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Russia says 16 killed in strike on student dorm that it blamed on Ukraine
item.description: The death toll from a drone strike ​on a student dorm in the Russian-controlled Luhansk region of eastern Ukraine has risen to 16, with most of the victims young women, Russian officials said on Saturday, after a heated U.N. debate on the incident.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24
